name: API Integration Planner
description: Plan API integrations between services with authentication and error handling

agents.name: Integration Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze APIs and plan the integration
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research both APIs: authentication methods, rate limits, endpoints needed, data formats, webhook capabilities, and SDKs available. Identify the optimal integration approach.

agents.name: Integration Planner
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create an integration plan with: authentication setup (API keys, OAuth flow), endpoint mapping, request/response examples, rate limit handling, retry and error handling strategy, data transformation layer, testing approach, and monitoring. Include code snippets for key operations.

suggestion_card.title: Integration Planner
suggestion_card.subtitle: Plan API integrations
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Plan integration between [service A] and [service B]

author: agentfactory
